name: Best RCCG Region – Sports Development
description: This award honours an RCCG Region that has significantly promoted sports and physical wellness as a tool for youth engagement, discipline, unity, and holistic development.

fields.label: Do you reside in Redemption City or an RCCG Region?
In less than 200 words, describe the types, frequency, and scale of sports programs organized by the region (e.g. youth tournaments, fitness weekends, sport outreaches).
In less than 200 words, explain how the sports initiatives have impacted the lives of young people spiritually, mentally, or socially.
In less than 200 words, describe how the region uses sports to develop leadership, teamwork, discipline, and mentorship among youths.
In less than 200 words, describe how the region includes diverse youth groups in sports and any success stories in talent discovery or development.
